An '''Ortolan merchant''' was a salesman on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. After the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] relocated to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] following their evacuation of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] arrived on Dantooine to secure supplies for the base. The Ortolan Merchant was under strict orders to only sell to those who told him a specific codeword. After Leia flawlessly pulled off the password, the merchant showed Leia his secret stash, consisting of weapons and supplies and helped her to load them onto their [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]].
